title: karta kaizen config
description: Opt-in switch for karta's stack-pack writer. The switch is absolute: absent or enabled:false means kaizen never runs, including direct invocation. Presence with enabled:true turns kaizen on — it runs after each karta-deliver run and seeds the project's packs into .karta/sme/ on the first enabled run.

enabled.description: true turns kaizen on; absent or false means it never runs, even invoked directly.

focus.description: Optional plain nudge about what to watch (e.g. 'watch the billing items and the auth rules'). NOT a task list.
